changes.motivation: The init-store step was a workaround that pre-populated a PVC with the Nix store from the nixos/nix container image so that the build-and-push step could mount it at /nix. This was unnecessary complexity — the build-and-push container can use the Nix image's built-in ephemeral store directly.
changes.summary: Removed the init-store CI/CD step from the Nix image builder Argo Workflow. Deleted infrastructure/demo_cicd/nix_image_builder/init-store.sh, removed the kubectl_manifest.pvc resource (amd64/arm64 nix-store PVCs), removed init-store.sh from the nix_image_builder_scripts ConfigMap, converted the build-and-push template from a containerSet (init-store + main containers) to a single container, removed the nix-store PVC volume from the merge-and-copy template, removed the depends_on = [kubectl_manifest.pvc] from the WorkflowTemplate manifest, and updated the comment block describing the workflow steps.
